title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. drymophilum
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. drymophilum, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. drymophilum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
